themes.name: PLI - Electronics Manufacturing
themes.description: Production Linked Incentive scheme for electronics and semiconductor manufacturing, driving domestic production and import substitution.
evidence: PLI scheme approved for Rs 76,000 Cr across electronics
India Semiconductor Mission with Rs 76,000 Cr outlay
Apple, Samsung expanding manufacturing in India

themes.name: PLI - Auto Components & EV
themes.description: PLI scheme for automotive industry and advanced chemistry cell batteries, boosting EV ecosystem and component localization.
evidence: PLI for auto sector: Rs 25,938 Cr approved
ACC PLI for battery manufacturing: Rs 18,100 Cr
FAME II subsidy driving EV adoption

themes.name: China+1 Supply Chain Shift
themes.description: Global companies diversifying supply chains away from China post-COVID, creating massive demand for Indian chemical, pharma, and textile manufacturers.
evidence: Global MNCs actively onboarding Indian chemical suppliers
India's chemical exports growing 15%+ CAGR
Textile PLI driving capacity addition

themes.name: EV Transition in India
themes.description: Electric vehicle adoption accelerating in India across 2W, 3W, and 4W segments. Benefits EV-ready OEMs, battery makers, and charging infra.
evidence: EV penetration in 2W crossing 5%, 4W at 2%
Major OEMs launching EV-only platforms
Battery costs declining 15% YoY

themes.name: EV Transition - ICE Disruption
themes.description: Long-term headwind for pure ICE (internal combustion engine) dependent companies and fossil fuel demand as EV adoption grows.
evidence: Peak oil demand projections being revised down
ICE ban discussions in EU affecting global OEM strategy

themes.name: Infrastructure Capex Cycle (NIP)
themes.description: National Infrastructure Pipeline with Rs 111 lakh Cr investment target. Massive government capex on roads, railways, ports, airports, and urban infra.
evidence: Government capex allocation consistently rising 20%+ YoY
NHAI highway construction at record pace
Vande Bharat, bullet train, metro expansion
PM Gati Shakti masterplan for multimodal connectivity

themes.name: Digital India / UPI Growth
themes.description: Digital payments via UPI growing exponentially. Fintech and digital banking disrupting traditional financial services. Data consumption rising.
evidence: UPI transactions crossing 15 billion per month
Digital lending growing 30%+ CAGR
Jan Dhan + Aadhaar + Mobile (JAM trinity) enabling financial inclusion

themes.name: Defense Indigenization (Atmanirbhar)
themes.description: Government pushing for self-reliance in defense manufacturing. Import embargo on 400+ items. Defense budget allocation rising consistently.
evidence: Defense budget crossed Rs 6 lakh Cr
Positive indigenization list: 400+ items under import embargo
Defense exports growing 10x in 5 years
Major orders: Tejas, Brahmos, naval vessels to domestic players

themes.name: Green Energy Transition
themes.description: India targeting 500 GW renewable energy by 2030. Solar, wind, green hydrogen getting massive policy support and global investment.
evidence: India's 500 GW renewable target by 2030
National Green Hydrogen Mission: Rs 19,744 Cr
Solar tariffs at all-time lows making renewables cheaper than coal
Global ESG flows directing capital to green energy

themes.name: Rising Crude Oil Prices
themes.description: Elevated crude oil prices act as a headwind for oil-importing sectors through higher input costs, logistics costs, and margin pressure.
evidence: India imports 85% of crude oil requirements
Every $10/bbl rise impacts GDP by 0.3%
Paint, chemical, and FMCG companies face raw material inflation

themes.name: RERA + Real Estate Formalization
themes.description: RERA regulation has cleaned up real estate, favoring organized listed players. Affordable housing push and low unsold inventory driving new cycle.
evidence: RERA eliminated fly-by-night developers
Listed developers gaining market share from unorganized sector
Housing sales at decade highs across top cities
Unsold inventory at multi-year lows

themes.name: Insurance Penetration Growth
themes.description: India's insurance penetration is among the lowest globally. Rising awareness post-COVID, regulatory push, and digital distribution driving rapid growth.
evidence: Insurance penetration at ~4% vs global 7%+
COVID drove awareness of health and life insurance
IRDAI simplifying regulations to boost adoption

themes.name: Premiumization Trend
themes.description: Rising incomes and aspirational middle class driving premiumization across consumption categories - from SUVs to premium FMCG to branded lifestyle.
evidence: SUV share in car sales crossed 55%
Premium FMCG growing 2x vs mass market
Branded apparel and lifestyle retail expanding rapidly

themes.name: Credit Growth Cycle
themes.description: Indian banking system cleaned up post-IBC. Credit growth reviving to 15%+ driven by retail, MSME, and corporate capex lending.
evidence: Bank credit growth at 15%+ sustained
GNPA ratios at decade lows across banking system
Corporate capex cycle reviving after decade-long lull
Retail credit penetration still low vs developed markets

themes.name: Pharma API Shift to India
themes.description: India becoming the global pharmacy. API (Active Pharmaceutical Ingredient) manufacturing shifting from China to India with government support.
evidence: PLI for pharma: Rs 15,000 Cr for API and bulk drugs
India supplies 20% of global generic medicines
Biosimilar opportunity: $100B market opening up
US FDA approvals for Indian manufacturers increasing

themes.name: AI / Cloud Computing Boom
themes.description: Global AI and cloud computing spending surge creating demand for Indian IT services companies. Also driving data center investments in India.
evidence: Global AI spending expected to cross $500B by 2027
Indian IT companies winning GenAI transformation deals
Cloud migration deals driving multi-year revenue visibility
Data center capacity in India expanding 3x

themes.name: Tight Liquidity / High Interest Rates
themes.description: Elevated interest rates increase borrowing costs, hurt real estate demand, and compress valuations for rate-sensitive sectors.
evidence: RBI repo rate at elevated levels
EMIs at multi-year highs impacting housing demand
NBFC borrowing costs squeezing margins

themes.name: Data Center Boom in India
themes.description: India emerging as a major data center hub. Data localization norms, growing internet users, and cloud adoption driving hyperscale DC investments.
evidence: India's DC capacity expected to triple by 2028
Major investments by AWS, Google, Microsoft, Reliance
Data localization driving captive DC demand
Each 100 MW DC drives Rs 5,000 Cr investment
